# US-CLI-001: Scaffold Evals for a Skill (P0)

**Feature**: [FS-439](./FEATURE.md)

**As a** skill author
**I want** to run `vskill eval init <plugin>/<skill>` and get a well-crafted evals.json generated by an LLM
**So that** I have realistic test cases and objectively verifiable assertions without writing them from scratch

---

No acceptance criteria defined.

- [x] **T-003**: Implement prompt builder and eval init command
- [x] **T-004**: Implement skill scanner and eval command router
